name: Barbecued Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Use lean meat, trimmed of fat.
2. Brown chops in a dry skillet and drain off the fat.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients and pour over the meat.
4. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Remove the cover and continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
6. The sauce will thicken as it cooks. Add water if the sauce becomes too thick.
